latHint: Think a fuss or commotion - not a movie segment.
pivHint: A SCENE plays out on screen - but you can also 'make a SCENE.' What word means an exaggerated fuss?
winText: Quite the performance. SCENE was the pivot - movie segment to full DRAMA and fuss.
lossText: DRAMA - an exaggerated, emotional fuss. SCENE was the pivot: movie segment to making a SCENE.
